educationMatch.explanation: Master's degree from Zhejiang University in EE/Automation satisfies the implied STEM/engineering background requirement. While not explicitly required in JD, the technical depth of the role is well-supported by this background.

experienceMatch.requiredYears: Significant experience managing infrastructure or platform engineering teams
experienceMatch.explanation: 26 total years with 25.7 years in management roles far exceeds the requirement. All management roles are directly in infrastructure/platform engineering: Mainet PM (2000-2007, 7yr) + eBay Team Lead DevEx (2007-2012, 4.7yr) + eBay CCOE SDM Cloud (2012-2017, 5yr) + eBay SDM App Lifecycle (2017-2023, 6.5yr) + eBay SDM Cloud Fleet (2023-present, 2.5yr) = 25.7 years. Every role is infrastructure or platform-focused, which is exactly what the JD requires.

missingSkills: Terraform (has internal automation tooling but Terraform not explicitly mentioned)
Istio/Envoy (has service mesh experience but specific tools not called out)
Cloudflare / Global Load Balancing (not mentioned in resume)
skillMatch.explanation: Extremely strong match on core K8s and infrastructure automation skills. Managed 100+ clusters across 3 regions/25 AZs with 2M+ pods. Built full cluster lifecycle automation (create, upgrade, tech refresh, decommission). Implemented SRE best practices (SLI/SLO, MTTD/MTTR) improving reliability from <90% to 99%+. Built self-healing LOM system for automated recovery. Gaps: Terraform not explicitly mentioned (likely uses internal tooling), Istio/Envoy not specifically named (service mesh in use), Cloudflare not mentioned.

responsibilityMatch.explanation: Near-perfect match. Built and led high-performing teams across US/China/Europe/India. Owned full K8s cluster lifecycle (create, upgrade, decommission) across 100+ clusters. Established SRE practices and SLO frameworks improving reliability from <90% to 99%+. Built self-healing LOM system and automated 35,000+ deployments/week. Set technical direction for cloud-native migration of 5,000+ applications. Minor gap: Terraform specifically not called out, but internal automation tooling covers the same function.

softSkillMatch.explanation: Exceptional soft skill match. 20+ year track record of leading infrastructure teams in ambiguous, fast-moving environments (multiple eBay platform generation shifts). Demonstrated coaching via Yiran's growth story (senior to staff promotion). Hired 8+ engineers in Europe and India with structured onboarding. Resolved manager conflicts and stakeholder alignment challenges. Created clarity through documented SOPs, runbooks, and structured roadmap planning across complex multi-team programs.

strengths: Direct ownership of Kubernetes platform at massive scale (100+ clusters, 2M+ pods, 3 regions, 25 AZs) - mirrors OpenAI's exact requirement
Full cluster lifecycle ownership: create, upgrade, tech refresh, decommission - exactly what the JD asks for
Proven SRE track record: implemented SLI/SLO framework, improved reliability from <90% to 99%+ in 2-3 months across multiple engagements
Built self-healing and automation systems (LOM) supporting 35,000+ deployments/week - directly addresses toil reduction requirement
25+ years managing infrastructure and platform engineering teams - matches 'significant experience' requirement completely
Recent global team expansion: hired 8+ engineers in Europe and India with structured onboarding - strong hiring track record
Comfortable with ambiguity: led multiple platform generation transitions (VM→OpenStack→K8s) requiring constant strategic pivots
improvements: Add Terraform to resume if used - JD explicitly mentions it as part of the tech environment

Quantify team sizes in each role more explicitly to reinforce hiring and retention track record
